violations.description: FOOD DISPLAY SERVICE AND TRANSPORT TEMP (5 pts): Rice noted not being held at 140 degrees fahrenheit or above. (discarded)
COLD AND HOT STORAGE EQUIPMENT (4 pts): Cold holding unit in the facility being used for cold holding temp of 41 degrees F was not functioning adequately.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
REFUSE STORAGE (1 pts): (Shared) exterior garbage container noted not covered with a tight fitting lid. ( lid is up)
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some ceiling covers wall behind dishwasher floor beneath hood and cooking equipment need routine cleaning. Ware-washing area needs recaulk to wall.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Fans need cleaning. Cooking equipment exteriors need routine cleaning.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): All food containers to be labeled. Scoop handle to be stored out of product.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Bottom-inside coolers and freezers noted in need of routine cleaning. Underside of shelving over cooling units need routine cleaning. Some food container exteriors noted in need of cleaning. Roll-carts need cleaning.
